content: (Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene depicts a dark, forested area with a narrow path leading into the distance. In the foreground, there appears to be a long, thin object resembling a bow or spear lying on the ground, featuring red stripes along its length.)

Lydia: Gods damn it, my Thane! That Daedric Wrath nearly split my tight ass in half! Though... I wouldn't mind if you found less painful ways to put something in my rear. Vadsi: Dark Elf snicker You Nords and your masochism. Though I can't blame you - if I had a Dragonborn's thick steel shaft at my disposal, I'd beg for punishment too. Lydia: Shut your fetcher mouth, elf!
